customer_ready_scope: module-local ct_pmp_acc NAPOT-mask parent packet: helper and flattened-parent same-state equivalence close, mask mutant reds, parent selected Sky130 area, OpenSTA max data-arrival, and OpenSTA estimated total power improve; helper-local timing regresses and is carried as a caveat; non-author replay reproduced all mapped netlists bit-exact; OpenSTA estimated power is not signoff power and not measured workload activity

target.proof_subject: helper same-state equivalence and flattened parent same-state equivalence under the checked RTL model

candidate.description: replace ct_pmp_comp_hit NAPOT mask casez table with prefix-AND mask identity addr_mask[i] = ~&pmpaddr_x_value[i:0]

power.methodology_boundary: OpenSTA estimated power under fixed global activity; not signoff power and not measured workload activity
OpenSTA estimated power under fixed global activity; not signoff power and not measured workload activity

proof_negative_control.mutation: shift addr_mask[1] to use pmpaddr_x_value[2:0], breaking the prefix-AND boundary

lean_fallback.reason: no discharged Lean theorem binds this candidate netlist; strongest current authority is Yosys helper and flattened-parent same-state equivalence plus a biting mask-formula proof mutant
lean_fallback.strongest_evidence: helper same-state Yosys equivalence proves 33/33 cells; flattened parent same-state equivalence proves 273/273 cells; mask mutant leaves 2 cells unproven; selected parent Sky130 area, OpenSTA max data-arrival, and OpenSTA estimated power improve in the package replay
lean_fallback.scope_boundary: ct_pmp_acc parent packet under the checked RTL model; not a whole-PMP, whole-C910/BOOM, ISA, privilege model, signoff timing, workload-power, or theorem-registry claim

independent_replay.summary: non-author replay reproduced all four mapped netlists byte-exact against the packet sha256s, both proofs proved, the NAPOT mutant failed with exactly 2 unproven cells, and the STA readings matched to the digit including the helper 2.24 -> 2.57 ns regression and parent 3.58 -> 3.51 ns improvement
